title: US Agencies Warn of Laundry Bear Campaign Targeting Unpatched Zimbra Servers
sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — US Agencies Warn of Laundry Bear Campaign Targeting Unpatched Zimbra Servers
id: b02aef4c-ecb7-582b-b271-a9fb5f78270a
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to US Agencies Warn of Laundry Bear Campaign Targeting Unpatched Zimbra Servers (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: CRITICAL | Class: GENERIC
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/US Agencies Warn of Laundry Bear Campaign Targeting Unpatched Zimbra Servers
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/07/24
modified: 2026/07/24
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: network_connection
    product: generic
detection:
    selection:
        EventID:
            - 4625
            - 4648
            - 4728
        LogonType: 3
    condition: selection
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative access
    - Service account activity
level: critical
kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — US Agencies Warn of Laundry Bear Campaign Targeting Unpatched Zimbra Servers — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-07-24T10:31:26Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "US Agencies Warn of Laundry Bear Campaign Targeting Unpatched Zimbra Servers", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX US Agencies Warn of Laundry Bear Campaign Targeting Unpatched Zimbra Servers Exploitation Attempt - GENERIC"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:2197220; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-07-24, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
_notice: Detection rules require PRO subscription. Subscribe at intel.cyberdudebivash.com/upgrade.html
